prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small gray metal cube
  - obj_1: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large gray rubber cube
  - obj_5: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_9: large brown metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0181] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0182] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

[qrr_0188] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0189] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0190] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0191] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0192] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0193] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0194] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0195] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0196] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0197] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0198] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0199] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0200] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_8 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects across multiple images. Let me carefully examine each image to understand the spatial layout.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their positions:
- obj_0: small gray metal cube
- obj_1: small cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_2: small purple metal sphere
- obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder
- obj_4: large gray rubber cube
- obj_5: small red rubber cylinder
- obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
- obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
- obj_8: small cyan metal cube
- obj_9: large brown metal sphere

Let me estimate distances from the images:

[qrr_0181] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_4 to obj_8: Gray metal cube to blue sphere vs gray rubber cube to cyan metal cube. These seem roughly similar. ~=

[qrr_0182] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_4 to obj_9: Gray cube to blue sphere vs gray rubber cube to brown sphere. obj_4 to obj_9 seems closer. >

[qrr_0183] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_5 to obj_6: Gray cube to blue sphere vs red cylinder to purple cylinder. obj_5 to obj_6 seems shorter. >

[qrr_0184] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_5 to obj_8: Gray cube to blue sphere vs red cylinder to cyan cube. obj_0 to obj_7 seems larger. >

[qrr_0185] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_6 to obj_8: Gray cube to blue sphere vs purple cylinder to cyan cube. obj_6 to obj_8 seems closer. >

[qrr_0186] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_6 to obj_9: Gray cube to blue sphere vs purple cylinder to brown sphere. Similar distances. ~=

[qrr_0187] obj_0 to obj_7 vs obj_8 to obj_9: Gray cube to blue sphere vs cyan cube to brown sphere. obj_8 to obj_9 seems closer. >

[qrr_0188] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_2: Gray metal cube to cyan metal cube vs cyan cylinder to purple sphere. obj_1 to obj_2 seems closer. >

[qrr_0189] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_3: obj_1 to obj_3 seems farther. <

[qrr_0190] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_4: obj_1 to obj_4 seems similar. ~=

[qrr_0191] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_5: obj_0 to obj_8 seems farther. >

[qrr_0192] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_7: obj_1 to obj_7 seems farther. <

[qrr_0193] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_1 to obj_9: obj_1 to obj_9 seems similar or slightly less. >

[qrr_0194] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_2 to obj_3: obj_2 to obj_3 seems farther. <

[qrr_0195] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_2 to obj_5: Similar distances. ~=

[qrr_0196] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_2 to obj_6: obj_2 to obj_6 seems farther. <

[qrr_0197] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_2 to obj_7: obj_2 to obj_7 seems farther. <

[qrr_0198] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_2 to obj_9: Similar. ~=

[qrr_0199] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_3 to obj_4: obj_3 to obj_4 seems closer. >

[qrr_0200] obj_0 to obj_8 vs obj_3 to obj_5: obj_3 to obj_5 seems closer. >
